title: CCTP/SDDB: Systemic Tau and ordinal RECD before spontaneous ventricular fibrillation
description:
Analysis code, cleaned RR series, results, and figures for the manuscript Context-Dependent Relational Reorganization of Heart Rate Dynamics Precedes Spontaneous Ventricular Fibrillation: Systemic Tau and Ordinal RECD Evidence from the Sudden Cardiac Death Holter Database.

v1.2.0 finalizes the public manuscript package with External Validation Phase 2 public interim: full PhysioNet NSRDB negative-control FAR (n=18; τs ≈ 33.7 and excess3 ≈ 32.3 alarms per 24 h under the frozen abs-z rule), device-mismatch caveat, no S5 claim, no clinical/deployability claim, Phase 2 planning docs and institutional Tier A data-request draft, and polished manuscript PDF. Phase 1 (VFDB n=11 sensitivity; NSRDB n=6 FAR baseline) and SDDB discovery N=10 remain foundational. Frozen parameters: θ3=0.08, high-threshold=0.65, Wτ=101, abs-z≥2×3.

Pipeline: RR extraction from PhysioNet SDDB, Systemic Tau (τs), phase-shuffle surrogates, nested ordinal RECD levels (Φ1–Φ3, excess3), λ-weighted RECD, batch orchestration for the N=10 analytic cohort, external Phase-1 and Phase-2 FAR scripts.

Companion library: systemictau. Source data: PhysioNet SDDB (DOI 10.13026/C2W306), VFDB, CUDB, NSRDB (raw .dat re-downloadable; annotations and cleaned RR included).

creators.name: Padilla-Villanueva, Johel
creators.affiliation: University of Puerto Rico, Medical Sciences Campus
